rationale: The cited paper is directly in the same substantive domain (extended/add-on warranty insurance purchase decisions) and provides a theory-plus-empirical model of warranty choice, which could plausibly serve as a core prior mechanism or comparison point. With this strong topical/theoretical overlap and a confirmed DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
